summary: The tender is primarily structured around providing ICT personnel resources on a time and materials basis, with a capped not-to-exceed (NTE) price.
primary_evidence: T&M Services (up to an NTE Price)
proposed Labour Rates for the applicable SFIA skillsets
actual time spent by the Supplier’s Personnel
secondary_indicators: Supplier’s Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Time and Materials (T&M)
reasoning: The tender documents consistently emphasize the provision of ICT personnel resources with billing based on time and materials, capped at a not-to-exceed price. The focus on labour rates, SFIA skillsets, and the requirement for timesheets as evidence of service delivery further supports the classification as staff augmentation time and materials.
